LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO JULY-18-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE COURT WILL ORDER THAT $100 PER PAY PERIOD BE GARNISHED AND $100 IN MONEY HELD BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE BE AWARDED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR ON THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL ORDER FORM IF THE TENTATIVE IS NOT CONTESTED. ORDER PREPARED BY THE COURT AND SERVED ON ALL PARTIES AND THE LEVYING OFFICER. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The judgment debtor's claim of exemption is granted in part and denied in part. The court will order that $100 per pay period be garnished and $100 in money held by the Sheriff's Office be awarded to the judgment creditor on the Judicial Council order form if the tentative is not contested.

Order prepared by the Court and served on all parties and the levying officer.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
